chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No.3096 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on M.A. No.16345/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply at flag ‘’A’’. 3. For orders on M.A. No.16346/2025 (Ex/A). 4. For hearing of bail application..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 10.11.2025 Mr. Mamoon A.K Shirwany, Advocate for Applicant a/w applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Through this Criminal Bail Application, the applicant/accused Ahmed Safdar son of Safdar Hussain Barlas seeks protective bail in FIR No.114/2012 under Section-302/324 PPC, registered at P.S Darakshan, Karachi. Learned counsel for the applicant/accused inter alia contends the applicant/accused is innocent and has been falsely implicated in this case; that a report under section-173 Cr.P.C was submitted in absentia under setion-512 Cr.P.C, however, no notice has been served upon the applicant and that recently police visited applicant’s house an informed him regarding pendency of present crime; that the applicant intends to surrender before the trial court for his bail but apprehends his imminent arrest by the hands of police at the doorstep of the court; that the applicant has been declared proclaimed offender, therefore, operation of the impugned order may be suspended, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 10 days from today i.e 10.11.2025 to 19.11.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court.

Learned counsel for the applicant/accused inter alia contends the applicant/accused is innocent and has been falsely implicated in this case; that a report under section-173 Cr.P.C was submitted in absentia under setion-512 Cr.P.C, however, no notice has been served upon the applicant and that recently police visited applicant’s house an informed him regarding pendency of present crime; that the applicant intends to surrender before the trial court for his bail but apprehends his imminent arrest by the hands of police at the doorstep of the court; that the applicant has been declared proclaimed offender, therefore, operation of the impugned order may be suspended, hence this application for protective bail. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for a period of 10 days from today i.e 10.11.2025 to 19.11.2025 (both days inclusive), subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. The applicant is directed to surrender before the trial Court. Meanwhile, the impugned order shall remain suspended. This protective bail shall cease to have its effect after expiry of 10 days period i.e. 19.11.2025 or when the Applicant surrenders himself before the concerned Court, whichever be earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case, the applicant fails to make his 2 appearance before the trial Court within a prescribed time, the surety submitted before this Court shall stand forfeited. Instant bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
